title: WPC Timber Tube Supplier & Dealer in Gurgaon | Room Partitions
metatitle: WPC Timber Tube Supplier & Dealer in Gurgaon | Room Partitions
shortDescription: Looking for the best WPC timber tube supplier and dealer in Gurgaon? Goals Floors provides premium 100% waterproof timber tubes for modern room partitions, ceiling louvers, and wall dividers across Delhi NCR at wholesale prices.
longDescription: Goals Floors is the premier WPC timber tube supplier and dealer in Gurgaon, Delhi, and Noida. Enhance your modern home and commercial interiors with our architectural WPC timber tubes. Widely used by interior designers for luxury room partitions, ceiling louvers, visual wall dividers, office cabins, and staircase paneling, our timber tubes deliver a high-end aesthetic. Unlike natural wood that bends, warps, and rots over time, our WPC timber tube partitions in Gurgaon are 100% waterproof, termite-proof, moisture-resistant, and require absolutely zero polishing. Available in stunning wood finishes like Walnut, Teak, and Wenge, they are perfectly suited for luxury living rooms, corporate offices, cafes, and hotel lobbies. The smart hidden clip installation system creates a seamless, screw-free architectural finish. Get your premium room dividers directly from the top supplier in NCR with fast delivery and professional installation support.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: Completely safe from moisture, wall dampness (seelan), and wood-boring insects (termites) for a lifetime of structural safety in Delhi NCR homes and commercial spaces.

features.title: Zero Polishing Required
features.description: Comes pre-finished with a premium natural wood-grain texture. No expensive painting, sanding, or yearly varnishing is ever needed.

features.title: Dual-Sided Premium Finish
features.description: Features a beautiful, consistent wooden texture on all four sides, making it perfect for 360-degree open room partitions and visual dividers where both sides are visible.

features.title: High Structural Stability
features.description: Made from a high-density composite material that stays perfectly straight and will never warp, bend, or crack like natural timber under temperature changes.

features.title: Seamless Hidden Installation
features.description: Installed using a smart internal clip system, ensuring that absolutely no ugly screws or nails are visible on the outside of the tubes, providing a clean architectural look.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Design
features.description: Manufactured from sustainable, recyclable materials, giving your Gurugram property a luxury architectural appearance without harming the environment.

applications: Luxury Room Partitions & Dividers in Gurgaon
Corporate Lobby & Reception Accents in NCR
installation: WPC timber tubes in Gurgaon are installed using a highly secure, hidden metal clip system fixed to the floor and ceiling. The hollow timber tube seamlessly slides over these internal clips, creating a clean, modern architectural finish without any visible screws. This installation process is extremely fast, dust-free, and perfectly suited for occupied homes, corporate offices, and restaurant interiors.
maintenance: Our WPC timber tubes require almost zero maintenance. Simply clean the dual-sided surface using a dry feather duster or a slightly damp microfiber cloth to remove everyday dust. The 100% waterproof polymer composite ensures the premium wood finish looks brand new for decades without ever needing wax or polish.

faqs.question: What is the cost of WPC timber tube partition?
faqs.answer:
WPC timber tube partitions in India typically cost between ₹250 and ₹900 per square foot depending on the tube size, design complexity, finish, and installation requirements.

• Basic WPC partition designs: ₹250–₹450 per sq. ft.
• Decorative residential partitions: ₹450–₹700 per sq. ft.
• Premium customized partitions: ₹700–₹900+ per sq. ft.

Installation charges may vary based on ceiling height and project complexity.

faqs.question: Is WPC 100% waterproof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, high-quality WPC is highly water resistant and is commonly marketed as 100% waterproof for practical interior and exterior applications.

Unlike natural wood, WPC does not absorb significant moisture, swell, or rot when exposed to water. This makes it a popular choice for partitions, wall panels, and decorative applications.

faqs.question: What are the disadvantages of WPC?
faqs.answer:
WPC offers excellent durability but also has a few limitations.

• It is usually more expensive than standard PVC products.
• Lower-quality WPC may fade under prolonged UV exposure.
• Heavy impacts can sometimes damage edges or corners.

Choosing premium-grade WPC significantly improves long-term performance and appearance.

faqs.question: Which one is better, PVC or WPC?
faqs.answer:
WPC is generally better than PVC for premium partitions and interior applications because it offers greater strength, durability, and a more natural appearance.

• WPC provides a wood-like finish.
• PVC is usually more affordable.
• WPC offers better screw-holding strength and structural stability.

For long-term interior projects, WPC is often the preferred option.

faqs.question: Which is costly, wood or WPC?
faqs.answer:
Natural hardwood is generally more expensive than WPC for most partition, paneling, and decorative applications.

While WPC may have a higher upfront cost than some low-grade woods, it usually costs less than premium hardwood and requires significantly less maintenance over time.

faqs.question: Which is the cheapest option for partition wall?
faqs.answer:
PVC partitions are generally among the cheapest partition wall options available in India.

• PVC partitions offer the lowest installation cost.
• Gypsum partitions are economical for office interiors.
• WPC partitions provide a more premium appearance at a higher cost.

The most suitable option depends on budget, durability requirements, and design preferences.

faqs.question: Is WPC termite-proof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, WPC is highly termite resistant because it contains polymer-based materials that termites do not consume like natural wood.

This makes WPC a practical choice for homes and commercial spaces where termite protection is important. Many property owners in Gurugram and Delhi NCR choose WPC to reduce long-term maintenance concerns.

faqs.question: What is the price of WPC 8x4?
faqs.answer:
A standard 8x4 feet WPC board in India typically costs between ₹2,500 and ₹8,000 per sheet depending on thickness, density, brand, and finish.

• Basic WPC boards: ₹2,500–₹4,000 per sheet.
• Mid-range WPC boards: ₹4,000–₹6,000 per sheet.
• Premium WPC boards: ₹6,000–₹8,000+ per sheet.

Prices may vary based on specifications and supplier.

faqs.question: Is WPC stronger than wood?
faqs.answer:
No, premium hardwood is generally stronger than WPC in terms of structural load-bearing capacity, but WPC often performs better in moisture-prone environments.

• Hardwood offers higher natural strength.
• WPC provides superior moisture resistance.
• WPC is less likely to warp, crack, or rot.

In areas affected by humidity or seelan, WPC can offer better long-term performance than many wood products.

faqs.question: Can we apply paint on WPC?
faqs.answer:
Yes, WPC can be painted if the surface is properly prepared and compatible primers and paints are used.

Many WPC products are available in pre-finished colors and wood textures, but custom painting is possible when a specific design or color scheme is required. Proper surface preparation helps ensure good paint adhesion and durability.

installationSteps.title: Layout Marking
installationSteps.description: Align the floor and ceiling points:
points: Use a laser level or plumb line to mark exact straight vertical points.
Ensure equal spacing between the center of each tube.
installationSteps.tip: Perfect marking is crucial so the tubes don't look crooked or tilted.

installationSteps.title: Fix the Mounting Clips
points: Screw the heavy-duty metal clips firmly into the floor.
Repeat the same process for the ceiling perfectly in line with the floor clips.
installationSteps.tip: For fragile ceilings (like POP), use a long continuous metal channel instead of individual clips.

installationSteps.title: Snap and Lock
points: Slide the hollow WPC timber tube onto the internal metal clips.
Push firmly until the tube locks into place.
Install the matching WPC end-caps at the top and bottom for a seamless, closed finish.
